subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be a sacrifice unto Thy sanctified presence! He hath declared: "O My Name, upon thee be My Glory!" His honour the Afnán, upon him be My Glory, is beneath Our gaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء فرمودند یا اسمی علیک بهائی جناب افنان علیه بهائی تحت لحاظ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
